name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Service Name
notes: This building block detects when a Carbon service is installed.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Service Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Service Installed
when the event matches Service Name (custom) is any of [srservice or ipvpn or hkmsvc]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Service Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Service Installed
AND when the event matches Service Name (custom) is any of [srservice or ipvpn or hkmsvc]
